title: Evaluation of the Energy Savings Opportunity Scheme (ESOS): privacy notice
body: "This notice sets out how we will process your personal data when taking part in the Energy Savings Opportunity Scheme (ESOS). It also sets out your rights. It is made under Articles 13 and/or 14 of the UK General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR).   This privacy notice will be updated at a later date to add the name of the appointed contractor(s).   "
